creator: kew@timesink.spk.wa.us
text:
emu-1.3 package installs an empty app-defaults file

How-To-Repeat: 
	# pkg_add emu-1.3.tgz
	> ll /usr/X11R6/lib/X11/app-defaults/Emu
	-r--r--r--  1 bin  bin  0 Nov 22 23:28 /usr/X11R6/lib/X11/app-defaults/Emu
	>
	> emu
	Warning: Emu: get_sub_resource_string: Couldn't get resource '*term.emu-rops' or
	 '*Term.emu-Rops

	 Error: Shell widget emu has zero width and/or height
